mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CHECKLIST ( ID, CHECKLIST_TITLE, CHECKLIST_MEMO, CHECKLIST_COMPLETED, CHECKLIST_FAILED, CHECKLIST_PRIORITY, PROJECT_ID, MEMBER_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_CHECKLIST.NEXTVAL, #{checklistTitle}, #{checklistMemo}, #{checklistCompleted}, #{checklistFailed}, #{checklistPriority}, #{projectId}, #{memberId} )
mapper.select: SELECT ID AS id, CHECKLIST_TITLE AS checklistTitle, CHECKLIST_MEMO AS checklistMemo, CHECKLIST_COMPLETED AS checklistCompleted, CHECKLIST_FAILED AS checklistFailed, CHECKLIST_PRIORITY AS checklistPriority, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId FROM TBL_CHECKLIST WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ORDER BY ID ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_CHECKLIST SET CHECKLIST_TITLE = #{checklistTitle}, CHECKLIST_MEMO = #{checklistMemo}, CHECKLIST_COMPLETED = #{checklistCompleted}, CHECKLIST_FAILED = #{checklistFailed}, CHECKLIST_PRIORITY = #{checklistPriority} WHERE ID = #{id}
